info.name: Microsoft Azure DataPlaneAccountClient
info.description: Creates a Microsoft.Purview data plane account client.

request.description: Get an account

response.name: Success
An error response received from the provider.

request.description: Updates an account

response.name: Success
An error response received from the provider.

request.description: Lists the connection strings that allow connecting with the Managed Event Hub, if it is provisioned. Those connection strings are aimed to receive messages from the ATLAS_ENTITIES hub or to send messages to the ATLAS_HOOK hub.

response.name: Success
An error response received from the provider.

request.description: Regenerates either the primary or secondary key of the Managed Event Hub, if it is provisioned.

response.name: Success
An error response received from the provider.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Collections Collectionname Getchildcollectionnames

request.description: Lists the child collections names in the collection.

response.name: Success
An error response received from the provider.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Collections Collectionname Getcollectionpath

request.description: Gets the parent name and parent friendly name chains that represent the collection path.

response.name: Success
An error response received from the provider.

request.description: Get a collection

response.name: Success
An error response received from the provider.

request.description: Creates or updates a collection entity.

response.name: Success
An error response received from the provider.

request.description: Deletes a Collection entity.

response.name: An error response received from the provider.

request.description: List the collections in the account.

response.name: Success
An error response received from the provider.
